Our Story

Born on the Water,
Built for Adventure

Rivora Kayaking by Hydra Sports & Tourism Pvt. Ltd. brings you the very first backwater kayaking experience in Nilambur. Feel the rhythm of the Chaliyar River as you glide through pristine waters from Kaipinikadavu Bridge, Chungathara — memories that last forever.

Our certified guides know every creek, canal, and current. Safety, sustainability, and pure joy are at the heart of every tour we run.

🛶

Certified Guides

Safety-trained, locally expert paddling instructors

🌿

Eco-Friendly

Leave-no-trace approach to protect the ecosystem

📸

Photos Included

Professional photos on all group tours, free of charge

🏆

Top Rated

Consistently 4.9★ rating on Google & TripAdvisor
